title: Sumerian/Akkadian: Sumerian Proverbs Collection 3
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Sumerian Proverbs Collection 3.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Sumerian Proverbs Collection 3.

translation.text: From 'Sumerian Proverbs Collection 3': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
